questions.question_text_full: Select the most appropriate option to substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. If there is no need to substitute it, select ‘No substitution required’. I couldn’t sleep in case of being very tired.
Select the most appropriate indirect form of the given sentence. Esha said, “Avika is not going to school today as she has fever.”

options.text: Esha said that Avika had not gone to school that day as she was having fever.
Esha said that Avika was not going to school today as she has fever.
Esha said that Avika was not going to school that day as she had fever.
Esha said that Avika is not going to school today as she has fever.

questions.correct_option_text: Esha said that Avika was not going to school that day as she had fever.

questions.question_text_full: Parts of the following sentence are given as options. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. My grandmother is quite concerned to my progress at school.

Given below are four jumbled sentences. Select the option that gives their correct order. A. The mountaineers set up a camp at a height of 15000 feet. B. Then they started climbing. C. They struggled up a steep slope and stopped at a height of 20000 feet. D. There they stayed for a week to get accustomed to the climate.
